title: Mounted Local Project State Route
summary: Mounted the Project State route shell in the local Studio app server and retired the old Jekyll route shell.
effect: The local Studio app now serves /studio/project-state/?mode=manage with the existing vanilla Project State browser module and route-ready contract. The route keeps the existing unavailable-service behavior when the catalogue and docs sibling services are not running, and the old Jekyll /studio/project-state/ shell has been removed. The catalogue and docs service APIs remain sibling calls for a later route-family API consolidation slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, view, config, and smoke files
